use_codes.desc: MANAGEMENT OF CHRONIC PAIN IN PATIENTS REQUIRING OPIOID ANALGESIA

indications.text:
Morphine Sulfate Injection is indicated for the management of pain severe enough to require an opioid
analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
Because of the risks of addiction, abuse, misuse, overdose, and death, which can occur at any dosage or
•
duration [...

Morphine sulfate is an opioid agonist indicated for the management of pain not responsive to non­
narcotic analgesics.

Morphine Sulfate Injection is indicated for the management of pain severe enough to require an opioid
analgesic and for which alternative treatments are inadequate.
Limitations of Use
